allow:
Bash(xargs python3 -c "
import sys, json
for line in open\(sys.argv[1]\):
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        if obj.get\(''type''\) == ''assistant'':
            print\(json.dumps\(obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''usage'', {}\), indent=2\)\)
            print\(''---model:'', obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''model''\)\)
            break
    except: pass
")
